title: Warp 9
description: A super high performance modpack that delivers ridiculously high frames per second. Nearly 4 times faster than vanilla. 30% more fps than popular performance modpacks, including Fabulously Optimized, Simply Optimized, and Adrenaline.
body:
A simple and lightweight modpack that promises high frames per second, even on low end systems. Nearly 4 times more FPS than vanilla Minecraft, and over 30% more fps than popular performance modpacks like Fabulously Optimized, Simply Optimized, and Adrenaline.

Comes with two shaders: Potato Shaders and Complementary Unbound. True to its name, Potato shaders offers good visuals and still great FPS. With Complementary Unbound, FPS is roughly the same as vanilla. 

This modpack serves as a good base if you want to add other mods. Just keep in mind that the mod "Exordium" is incompatible with many mods and you may have to disable it if you get crashes.

The modpack includes Nvidium, a mod which significantly improves FPS. However, its features will only work if shaders are disabled and you are using a modern Nvidia GPU that supports "mesh shaders"

NOTE: Fluctuations in fps occur in Warp 9 and the other tested performance modpacks, so getting a completely accurate representation of average frames per second is difficult. However, on average, Warp 9 has an approximate 200 to 300 fps lead on Adrenaline, Fabulously Optimized, and Simply Optimized. At its highs it has nearly a 500 fps lead, and at its lows it is comparable to these modpacks.
